originalTitle: Gap and American Eagle shares both get crushed — and neither retailer is blaming the economy
summary: Despite earnings that underwhelmed investors, executives at both Gap and American Eagle Outfitters said nothing is wrong with the economy.
content: Despite earnings that underwhelmed investors, executives at both Gap and American Eagle Outfitters said nothing is wrong with the economy.
chineseTitle: Gap 和 American Eagle 股价双双暴跌，两家零售商均未将原因归咎于经济
chineseSummary: 尽管盈利结果令投资者失望，但 Gap 和 American Eagle Outfitters 的高管均表示，经济没有任何问题。
chineseContent: 尽管盈利结果令投资者失望，但 Gap 和 American Eagle Outfitters 的高管均表示，经济没有任何问题。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
